JScience 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT
  1. org.jscience.core.util

Uses of Package
org.jscience.core.util

Packages that use org.jscience.core.util
Package
Description
org.jscience.core.mathematics.ml.neural
 
org.jscience.core.methodology
Core functionality for the org.jscience.core.methodology package in the JScience library.
org.jscience.core.util
 
org.jscience.core.util.identity
 
org.jscience.natural.biology
 
org.jscience.natural.biology.cell
 
org.jscience.natural.biology.ecology
 
org.jscience.natural.biology.evolution
 
org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.sbml
Systems Biology Markup Language (SBML) loader for JScience.
org.jscience.natural.biology.neuroscience
 
org.jscience.natural.biology.taxonomy
 
org.jscience.natural.chemistry
 
org.jscience.natural.chemistry.biochemistry
 
org.jscience.natural.chemistry.elements
 
org.jscience.natural.chemistry.spectroscopy
 
org.jscience.natural.computing.ml
 
org.jscience.natural.earth
 
org.jscience.natural.earth.atmosphere
 
org.jscience.natural.earth.coordinates
 
org.jscience.natural.earth.geology
Core functionality for the org.jscience.natural.earth.geology package in the JScience library.
org.jscience.natural.engineering
 
org.jscience.natural.engineering.continuum
 
org.jscience.natural.engineering.eventdriven
 
org.jscience.natural.engineering.fluids
 
org.jscience.natural.medicine
Provides the org.jscience.social.medicine module.
org.jscience.natural.medicine.epidemiology
 
org.jscience.natural.methodology.experiment
Core functionality for the org.jscience.core.methodology.experiment package in the JScience library.
org.jscience.natural.physics
Covers:
org.jscience.natural.physics.astronomy
 
org.jscience.social.architecture
Provides mathematical and analytical models for architectural engineering, building physics, and urban history.
org.jscience.social.architecture.traffic
Provides models and simulation engines for urban traffic flow analysis.
org.jscience.social.architecture.urbanism
Provides mathematical and computational models for urban planning, land-use analysis, and urban climatology.
org.jscience.social.arts
- artworks, music, literature classification.
org.jscience.social.arts.music
- musical notes, instruments, compositions.
org.jscience.social.arts.theater
- plays, performances, dramatic arts.
org.jscience.social.economics
Provides comprehensive mathematical models for economic systems, agent-based modeling, and financial analysis.
org.jscience.social.economics.models
 
org.jscience.social.economics.money
Provides classes for monetary and financial operations.
org.jscience.social.economics.resources
Provides classes and interfaces for representing economic resources.
org.jscience.social.geography
Provides classes for social geography, human settlements, and mapping.
org.jscience.social.history
- historical events, timelines, and chronology.
org.jscience.social.history.archeology
Provides classes and interfaces for archaeological research and analysis.
org.jscience.social.history.calendars
Historical and alternate calendar systems for chronological calculations.
org.jscience.social.history.time
Temporal coordinate and interval support for historical analysis.
org.jscience.social.law
Provides the org.jscience.social.law module.
org.jscience.social.linguistics
Provides mathematical and computational models for natural language processing, linguistic analysis, and glottochronology.
org.jscience.social.medicine.consultation
Core functionality for the org.jscience.social.medicine.consultation package in the JScience library.
org.jscience.social.philosophy
Provides support for philosophy, including formal logic, ethics, epistemology, and storytelling.
org.jscience.social.philosophy.epistemology
Provides classes for modeling epistemology, the study of knowledge and justified belief.
org.jscience.social.philosophy.storytelling
Provides the org.jscience.social.philosophy.storytelling module.
org.jscience.social.politics
Provides the org.jscience.social.politics module.
org.jscience.social.politics.flags
Provides classes for the study and representation of flags (vexillology).
org.jscience.social.psychology
Provides the org.jscience.social.psychology module.
org.jscience.social.psychology.social
Provides the org.jscience.social.psychology.social module.
org.jscience.social.sociology
- social structures, persons, and cultural modeling.
org.jscience.social.sociology.survey
Core functionality for the org.jscience.social.sociology.survey package in the JScience library.
org.jscience.social.sports
Provides classes and interfaces for sports science, athletic performance analysis, and competition modeling.
  • Classes in org.jscience.core.util used by org.jscience.core.mathematics.ml.neural
    Class
    Description
    EnumRegistry
    Registry for ExtensibleEnum values.
    ExtensibleEnum
    Abstract base class for extensible enumeration pattern.
  • Classes in org.jscience.core.util used by org.jscience.core.methodology
    Class
    Description
    Commented
    Interface for objects that can have comments and dynamic attributes/traits.
    EnumRegistry
    Registry for ExtensibleEnum values.
    ExtensibleEnum
    Abstract base class for extensible enumeration pattern.
    Named
    Interface for identified objects.
    Positioned
    Interface for objects that have a spatial or conceptual position.
    UniversalDataModel
    Common interface for all universal data models in JScience.
  • Classes in org.jscience.core.util used by org.jscience.core.util
    Class
    Description
    EnumRegistry
    Registry for ExtensibleEnum values.
    ExtensibleEnum
    Abstract base class for extensible enumeration pattern.
    Logger
    Logging facade for JScience.
    Numbering
    Represents a hierarchical numbering (e.g., "1.0.1", "Article 42.1").
